title: [硬件撚]討論硬件知識、砌機LIST、解答問題集中帖(149）望下#1 先 持續更新中

replies.msg:
新人求List需知

為方便連登眾巴絲可以幫助你，請你合作
不但可以令連登眾巴絲可以盡快回覆你的問題，更可以令條List更適合你所需

關於所有店舖事項請巴打從其他有效方式聯絡

顯卡係蝗語，請講顯示卡或display card


1. Budget
NO MONEY NO TALK ，預算上限寬鬆可以買好一點，預算太低可能要將就或繼續儲錢

打機INTEL
多工AMD
intel low budget 留意返真。唔超就cpu:8700 or below, mb: b360, ram: 8*2 2666Mhz ddr4

2. 電腦主要用途
你想玩咩遊戲? (多數砌機都會打機，如果唔係請另外講明)
最好講game名，唔好一句Steam game/blizzard/EA game就算
因為成千上萬隻人地唔知你玩邊隻
需唔需要直播或錄製遊戲影片?

3. 個人需求
玩以上遊戲你最低可接受嘅畫質(Ultra/高/中/低)?最低可接受幾fps?
如果你預計會玩新遊戲，想幾耐唔駛升級電腦硬件?
想唔想超頻?散熱需求如何?使唔使靜過Dyson?
有冇特定嘅牌子信仰?想唔想有華麗嘅RGB光效?

4. 現在或將會使用mon的類型
解像度有分1080p, 2K(1440p), 4K(2160p)
更新頻率有分60Hz, 144Hz, 240Hz
畫面比例有分 16:9, 21:9, 32:9
你想要咩解像度(畫質)同更新頻率(流暢度)?
解像度高，會對打機效能造成影響，但畫質會更好
更新頻率高，如效能足夠可以造成比低更新頻率更好嘅流暢度

5. 自己都學習一些
講真，班巴絲好憎伸手黨，所以建議你行多一兩步
哪怕你直接照抄悠二巴打List放上黎問，佢地都會出手幫助
只係Ctrl-C和Ctrl-V咁簡單，大家都會開心嘅事點解唔做呢?
甚至可能你在過程中已經搵到需要的答案都不一定!
(悠二List網站 : http://yujihw.com
HKTerminal 飛馬等網站都有list provide)

6. 大腦Google係一樣很有用的東西

7. 火牛： 平 Antec eco2, delta 500W(Comdex有賣) 貴 corsair RMx OR Evga G2/P2/T2 (G3 有人話QC 有問題 唔推)

8. 請上銅柱(MB and M.2),重覆檢查插好power,hdd led pin,HD AUDIO,MB 24PIN,usb2.0/3.0,fan pin(cpu,cha) or 3pin 4pin

9. 走線
走線
走線
走線未呀茶包

10. 召喚硬件傳心師
冇人知你部機咩spec 呀
你有咩壞野問題唔該貼返full spec
CPU, MB, RAM, DISPLAY CARD, PSU etc.
如果開唔到機請附上機箱內部圖片一張
（走好線先）

11.
邊到買野好？
HJ2Q 3C1J
黃金：中央田 CentralField
黃金：正都 Capital
黃金：匯訊 Comdex
旺電：珍寶 Jumbo

網店：
faroll (悠二白汁腸)
hkterminal
飛馬電腦

海外：
新蛋 NewEgg
美馬 Amazon
(R free shipping 小心畀人開post 話乞衣
你屌返佢轉頭當打和喇)

12.
拆cpu cooler 前記得整熱部機
Amd 拔劍有事幫你唔到

13.
H310 A320 不了
真係冇budget 先考慮

14.
Cooler Master 不是好東西
見親都係叫你轉嫁喇

15. 買咩箱好 (FD 教軍)
Itx: Node 202, Silverstone RVZ 系列, inwin A1
Matx: Define Mini C
Atx: Define C 有d 錢多HDD 就再上 Define R6 , 窄身RL06, P600S(新出)

16. For Advance Information
vrm 資料
amd : https://www.hardwareluxx.de/community/f12/pga-am4-mainboard-vrm-liste-1155146.html
intel :
https://www.hardwareluxx.de/community/f12/lga-1151-mainboard-vrm-liste-1175784.html

有咩要加再同1001講

lm

Hynix Details First DDR5 Chip

SAN FRANCISCO — SK Hynix gave the first detailed description of a synchronous DRAM chip based on the DDR5 specification at the International Solid State Circuits Conference here. Rival South Korean vendor Samsung countered in the same session by describing the implementation of an SDRAM process based on the low-power flavor of the spec, LPDDR5.

DDR5 — or Double Data Rate 5 — is still under development at the Jedec standards organization. DDR5 offers double the bandwidth and double the density of DDR4 along with delivering improved channel efficiency. The standard was expected to be finalized last year, but remains a work in progress. DDR5 products are now expected to appear beginning late this year.

Dongkyun Kim, a Hynix chip designer, presented the ISSCC paper Wednesday on the Hynix DDR5 chip, a 16Gb 6.4Gb/s/pin SDRAM that runs at 1.1V and measures 76.22mm2. The device is fabricated in a 1ynm, 4-metal DRAM process.

Kim described the implementation of a modified delay-locked loop (DLL) using a phase rotator and an injection locked oscillator to reduce clock jitter and clock duty cycle distortion associated with operating at higher clock speeds. He also described other techniques used by the Hynix design team, including a write-level training method to offset clock-domain issues associated with higher speeds and a modified forward feedback equalization (FFE) circuit.

Samsung, meanwhile, described a 10nm-class LPDDR5 SDRAM capable of up to 7.5Gb/s at 1.05V.

Jedec announced earlier this week the publication of the LPDDR5 standard, which will eventually operate at an I/O rate of 6400 MT/s, 50% higher than that of the first version of LPDDR4. It is expected to boost memory speed and efficiency for applications including smartphones, tablets and ultra-thin notebooks.

Jim Handy, principal analyst at Objective Analysis, said he found the Samsung presentation short on technical details about the LPDDR5 chip. "They didn’t really discuss their chip, which is what ISSCC is supposed to be all about.," Handy said in an email exchange with EE Times.

https://www.eetimes.com/document.asp?doc_id=1334351

1. 你呢隻Type-R 450W只有一條6+2唔夠插
2. 呢450W入面好大部份都係3.3V同5V, 以前啲機會食多啲呢兩樣, 不過時代已經唔同晒, 而家比較睇重12V, 你呢隻12V輸出只有240W
3. GTR呢個牌子品質唔好
4. 加咗呢張咭之後呢隻牛已經唔適合你呢部機, 必須換一隻好啲嘅
5. 絕對唔好駁轉接線夾硬用
